der_note: Quantile der1: val=target-approx; |val|<delta ? 0 : (val>0 ? alpha : -(1-alpha)); der2=0 (error_functions.h:485-493 TQuantileError; alpha/delta defaults 0.5/1e-6 at :468-469). At alpha=0.5,delta=1e-6 it equals MAE.
leaf_method_note: Quantile=Exact (weighted alpha-quantile of leaf residuals target-approx; CalcOneDimensionalOptimumConstApprox -> CalculateWeightedTargetQuantile, error_functions.h:457-498). leaf_estimation_iterations:1. The alpha=0.7 fixture exercises the alpha!=0.5 path; the alpha=0.5 fixture is the MAE-equivalence anchor (Quantile{0.5}==MAE bit-for-bit vs leaf_methods/exact).
staged_layout: flat f64: stage 0 (n_rows), then stage 1, ... ; n_iterations stages (RAW approximant, RawFormulaVal)
